Below is a paragraph from an academic paper.
Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concisio and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modifigstign and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table.
"By introducing a certain dissipativity property to f and g and utilizing the Itˆo formula,
we obtain a solution that is uniformly bounded in time."

By incorporating a specific dissipativity criterion to functions f and g, and employing the Itô formula, we derive a solution that maintains uniform bounds over time.

| Modification | Explanation |
|--------------|-------------|
| introduced | Replaced "introducing" to maintain consistency with academic language. |
| dissipativity property | Rephrased as "dissipativity criterion" for conciseness and clarity. |
| the Itˆo formula | Corrected spelling to "Itô formula" for accuracy. |
| encompasses | Reworded to "obtain" to enhance clarity and readability. |
| uniformly bounded | Adjusted phrasing to "maintains uniform bounds" for better cohesion. |

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper.
Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concisio and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modifigstign and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table.
“By introducing a certain dissipativity property to f and g and utilizing the Itˆo formula,
we obtain that the solution  is uniformly bounded in time.”

By incorporating a specific dissipativity property to functions f and g and utilizing the Itô formula, we establish that the solution remains uniformly bounded in time.

| Modification | Explanation |
|--------------|-------------|
| introduced | Replaced "introducing" to maintain consistency with academic language. |
| dissipativity property | No modification needed. |
| the Itˆo formula | Corrected spelling to "Itô formula" for accuracy. |
| we obtain that | Reworded to "we establish that" for conciseness and clarity. |
| the solution  is uniformly bounded | Adjusted phrasing to "the solution remains uniformly bounded" for better cohesion. |

"In this study, we investigate the long-term behavior of a semilinear stochastic differential
equation that is defined on the entire real line."

This study explores the long-term dynamics of a semilinear stochastic differential equation defined over the entire real line.

|--------------|-------------|
| investigate | Replaced "investigate" to align with academic language. |
| behavior | Changed to "dynamics" to better reflect the concept being studied. |
| that is defined on | Eliminated unnecessary verbiage for conciseness. |

tion."

If g is equal to zero, the aforementioned equation is commonly known as a stochastic reaction-diffusion equation.

| stochastic | Retained "stochastic" to accurately describe the equation. |
| reaction-diffusion | Retained "reaction-diffusion" to capture the nature of the equation. |
| equation | Maintained "equation" as it accurately represents the subject. |

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper.
Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concisio and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modifigstign and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table.
"Moreover, Gyöngy and Nualart [20] have been studied the existence and uniqueness of a mild solution for equation (1.1) with multiplication space-time white noise in an unbounded domain. They establish the existence and uniqueness of a local solution by
applying the fixed-point theorem. Subsequently, necessary estimates for global existence are
derived by introducing an auxiliary function."

Moreover, Gyöngy and Nualart [20] have studied the existence and uniqueness of a mild solution for equation (1.1) involving multiplication of space-time white noise in an unbounded domain. They establish the existence and uniqueness of a local solution through the application of the fixed-point theorem. Subsequently, necessary estimates for global existence are obtained by introducing an auxiliary function.

| Modification | Explanation |
|--------------|-------------|
| have been studied | Modified to "have studied" for clearer and more concise phrasing. |
| multiplication space-time white noise | Replaced with "involving multiplication of space-time white noise" for clarity. |
| applying the fixed-point theorem | Adjusted phrasing to "through the application of the fixed-point theorem" for better cohesion. |
| derived | Modified to "obtained" for consistency of language. |
| an auxiliary function | Retained "an auxiliary function" to accurately describe the concept. |

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper.
Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concisio and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modifigstign and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table.
“ They established the existence and uniqueness of a local solution by
applying the fixed-point theorem. Subsequently, necessary estimates for global existence were
derived by introducing an auxiliary function.”

The researchers established the existence and uniqueness of a local solution by leveraging the fixed-point theorem. Subsequently, they derived the necessary estimates for global existence through the introduction of an auxiliary function.

| Modification | Explanation |
|--------------|-------------|
| They | Replaced with "The researchers" for clarity and to maintain a formal tone. |
| applying | Replaced with "leveraging" for a more precise and concise phrasing. |
| derived | Adjusted tense to "they derived" for consistency. |
| an auxiliary function | No modification needed. |

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper.
Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concisio and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modifigstign and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table.
"Additionally, Da Prato
proposed a method for proving the existence of an invariant measure based on the Krylov-
Bogolioubov theorem, which is documented in [11]. "

Furthermore, Da Prato proposed a method, documented in [11], for establishing the existence of an invariant measure based on the Krylov-Bogolioubov theorem. 

| Modification | Explanation |
|--------------|-------------|
| Additionally | Replaced with "Furthermore" for better flow and cohesion. |
| proving | Adjusted to "establishing" for clarity and conciseness. |
| the existence of an invariant measure | Retained the original phrase to accurately convey the concept being discussed. |
| based on | Retained "based on" to accurately describe the relationship between the method and the theorem. |
| which is documented in [11] | Moved the information about the documentation to the end of the sentence for smoother readability. |

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper.
Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concisio and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modifigstign and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table.
"Our primary focus lies in investigating unbounded domains, which present additional chal-
lenges compared to bounded domains due to the absence of compactness. "

Our main focus is on investigating unbounded domains, which pose additional challenges compared to bounded domains due to the lack of compactness.

| Modification | Explanation |
|--------------|-------------|
| primary | Replaced with "main" for better conciseness. |
| lies in | Eliminated "lies in" for a more straightforward sentence structure. |
| investigating | Retained "investigating" to maintain the original meaning. |
| challenges | Adjusted to "pose additional challenges" for clearer phrasing. |
| compared to bounded domains | Retained to highlight the specific comparison being made. |
| due to the absence of compactness | Reworded to "due to the lack of compactness" for better clarity. |

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper.
Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concisio and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modifigstign and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table.
"Notably, they were the first to establish that the semigroup S(t) is
a Hilbert-Schmidt operator, thereby demonstrating its compactness in unbounded domains."

Notably, they were the first to establish the compactness of the semigroup S(t) in unbounded domains by demonstrating that it is a Hilbert-Schmidt operator.

| Modification | Explanation |
|--------------|-------------|
| Notably | Retained to emphasize the significance of their accomplishment. |
| they were the first to establish | Reworded to "they were the first to establish" to maintain clarity. |
| that the semigroup S(t) is a Hilbert-Schmidt operator | Adjusted phrasing to "by demonstrating that it is a Hilbert-Schmidt operator" for conciseness. |
| thereby | Eliminated "thereby" as it does not contribute significantly to the sentence. |
| demonstrating its compactness in unbounded domains. | Reorganized to "by demonstrating the compactness of the semigroup in unbounded domains" for better flow. |
